title: Reasoning
description: Canonical explainability envelope (Constitution VI, FR-X-006). Published by Module 0 and reused by every module that produces a recommendation. Carries the exact inputs and bilingual rationale that produced a result so it can be shown to the user and reproduced in debugging.

inputs.description: The input values (with their sources/freshness where applicable) that produced the result. Redacted from debug logs; recorded in full only in the append-only audit trail.

rationale_fr.description: Human-readable 'why', French (fr-CA). A missing fr rationale is a bilingual defect (Constitution II).
